value.found_quote: By default, the agent runs with network access turned off... For Codex cloud, see agent internet access to enable full internet access or a domain allow list. For the Codex app, CLI, or IDE Extension, the default `workspace-write` sandbox mode keeps network access turned off unless you enable it in your configuration... You can also control the web search tool without granting full network access to spawned commands.
value.rationale: The page directly substantiates the claim. It confirms that: (1) network access is off by default in workspace-write mode; (2) users can enable full internet access or a domain allowlist (via `features.network_proxy` with domain rules, or via Codex cloud's internet access settings); (3) web search tool controls exist (cached, live, or disabled). The page describes these as current, active features with detailed configuration instructions.
